add.description: Explicit documentation of POST /api/v1/cart/items endpoint including request/response schemas, default quantity handling logic, and error scenarios.
add.reason: Story requires this endpoint with default quantity behavior, but LLD does not explicitly document it.

add.requirement_reference: Empty cart state must trigger specific UI redirection ('continue shopping' link)
add.description: Business rule specifying that when GET /api/v1/cart returns empty items array, response must include 'isEmpty: true' flag and 'redirectUrl' field for frontend UI redirection.
add.reason: Story mandates empty cart state triggers UI redirection, but LLD does not document this rule.

add.description: Complete specification for PUT endpoint including validation rules, automatic recalculation trigger, and error handling.
add.reason: Story requires quantity update endpoint, but LLD does not fully specify it.

modify.current_state: CartItem entity likely defined but price snapshot mechanism may not be explicit.
modify.required_change: Explicitly document price snapshot capture strategy and timestamp in CartItem entity.
modify.reason: Story requires CartItem to contain current Price Snapshot for pricing accuracy.

modify.current_state: Calculation logic may exist but automatic trigger mechanism not explicit.
modify.required_change: Document automatic recalculation trigger mechanism for subtotal and cart total upon any quantity mutation.
modify.reason: Story mandates automatic recalculation for all quantity mutations.

modify.current_state: Cart-user binding mechanism may not be fully specified.
modify.required_change: Document dual binding strategy for guest (sessionId) and authenticated users (userId), and cart migration logic.
modify.reason: Story requires ShoppingCart bound to user session or ID.

delete.description: Any 'Save for Later', 'Wishlist', or similar features.
delete.reason: Not part of Story SCRUM-1140 scope; represents scope drift.

delete.description: Advanced caching, CDN integration, or real-time sync features.
delete.reason: Premature optimization not required for initial cart management implementation.
